title: Rollout ground-truth record
description: Full-rollout ground truth for one position (PLAN.md §1.3). Stores per-move / per-cube-action equities and error sizes so scoring is a lookup. STUB: fields are indicative, not final.

engine.description: gnubg = authoritative ground truth; xg = optional future cross-check only (PLAN.md §1.3, §7).

rollout_meta.description: The exact settings blob truth was produced with, for reproducibility / re-roll (PLAN.md §1.3).

moves.description: Legal moves (top-K, K~15, incl. best + second) with rollout equities.

error_mp.description: Non-negative error vs the best move in millipoints (equity delta x 1000; 0 for the best move).

std_err.description: Rollout standard error of this move's equity (same equity units), used for the equivalence tolerance in PLAN.md §4.3.

rank.description: 1-based rank by equity as reported by the engine (1 = best).

cube.description: Present when decision_type == cube; the three canonical equities (PLAN.md §1.3).

no_double_equity.description: Doubler equity if no double is offered ('no action'), from the on-roll player's perspective.

double_take_equity.description: Doubler equity if it doubles and the opponent takes.

double_pass_equity.description: Doubler equity if it doubles and the opponent passes (typically +1 cube point).

best_action.description: Derived best action for the position's decider.

error_mp.description: Non-negative millipoint cost of each named action relative to the best available to whoever chooses it: 'No double' is the doubler's cost of not doubling; 'Double, Take'/'Double, Pass' are the receiver's cost of the wrong response.

equity_gap.description: Blunder margin (best - second-best); scoring input and near-free-decision filter — tiers are human-difficulty-based (PLAN.md §3).
